title: huperbaino #5233
definition:
1) to step over, beyond
 2) metaph.
    2a) to transgress
    2b) to overstep the proper limits
    2c) trespass, do wrong, sin
        2c1) of one who defrauds another in business
    2d) overreaches
nasbUsage:
